message:
web: Simplify log list item metadata display

- Remove tool count, file count, and cost from meta row
- Keep diff stats and format repo as owner/repo@branch with GitHub icon
- Strip github.com/ prefix from repo display
- Add font-medium to summary and reduce hover opacity

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/923ccd6c-39a9-4cb7-9e1a-615cbb86bd8a
